title: astrantia pauciflora subsp. pauciflora
intro: Astrantia pauciflora subsp. pauciflora, also known as the Mountain Masterwort, is a plant species within the genus Astrantia, belonging to the family Apiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Astrantia pauciflora subsp. pauciflora include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
